texto: Brook, you don't sound like yourself."My reply came out of my mouth before I could choose it. "I am not the person I was three weeks ago and I will never be that person again."Surprised by my own response, I relayed it to my therapist who was helping me work through issues surrounding my brother's death. "Of course you're not," she said. "And one of the best things you can do for yourself is to know that you are a different person now.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brook Noel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Brook, you don't sound like yourself."My reply came out of my mouth before I could choose it. "I …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, grief, person pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e trabalho.
